U.S. Soccer › News › Youth National Teams

U.S. U-17 BNT Announces Roster for January 2026 Training Camp

U.S. Soccer Communications · December 15, 2025

CHICAGO — U.S. Under-17 Boys' National Team head coach Gonzalo Segares has named 22 players to the roster for the team's upcoming January 2026 Training Camp at the IMG Academy in Bradenton, Florida. The camp will run from January 5-12, 2026 and serves as the first gathering of the new cycle.

The group features players from MLS NEXT, ECNL, and the U.S. Soccer Development Academy pipeline. Several call-ups are making their first appearance with the U-17s.

U-17 BNT January 2026 Training Camp Roster

Name Pos. Club Year
Matteo Alvarez GK FC Dallas 2027
Caleb Washington GK Philadelphia Union Academy 2028
Henry O'Brien D LA Galaxy Academy 2027
Isaiah Rivera D Real Colorado 2027
Jaylen Martins D Houston Dynamo Academy 2028
Kofi Adusei D NYCFC Academy 2027
Leo Nakamura D Seattle Sounders Academy 2028
Marcus Keane M Atlanta United Academy 2027
Nathan Oduro M FC Cincinnati Academy 2027
Owen Patterson M Solar SC 2028
Paulo Mendes M Orlando City Academy 2027
Quinn Sullivan M St. Louis CITY SC Academy 2028
Rafael Diaz M Inter Miami CF Academy 2027
Sam Hollister F Colorado Rapids Academy 2027
Tomas Herrera F San Jose Earthquakes Academy 2028
Uriel Bennett F Chicago Fire FC Academy 2027
Victor Lamine F Sporting Kansas City Academy 2028
Walker Dominguez F Austin FC Academy 2027
Xavier Tran D Vancouver Whitecaps Academy 2028
Yusef Aziz GK DC United Academy 2027
Zane Carpenter M Nashville SC Academy 2028
Andre Okafor F New York Red Bulls Academy 2027

For more on the U-17 BNT, visit the team page. Follow @USYNT on social media for updates from camp.

U.S. Soccer Federation
